name: Veal Birds Paprika
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten the cutlets between two pieces of plastic wrap.
2. In a heavy skillet, cook 1/2 cup of onion and mushrooms in 6 tablespoons butter over moderate heat, stirring occasionally, until the onion is golden.
3. Stir in bread crumbs, basil, salt, and pepper to taste. Let the filling cool.
4. Divide the filling among the cutlets and fold in the long sides of each cutlet, about 1/2-inch.
5. Roll up the cutlets and tie them at each end.
6. In a large heavy skillet, heat 2 tablespoons butter over moderate heat. Brown the veal birds (patted dry) and transfer them to a bowl as they are browned.
7. In the skillet, cook the remaining onions in 1 tablespoon butter over moderate heat, stirring until golden.
8. Stir in stock, tomato puree, and paprika. Add the veal birds and any accumulation of juices.
9. Simmer the mixture, covered, for 15-20 minutes or until the veal is tender.
10. Arrange noodles on a platter, remove strings from the veal, and transfer the vealed to the platter.
11. Whisk the sour cream with salt and pepper in the skillet contents until hot, stirring occasionally. Do not let it boil.
12. Serve alongside the meat and noodles.
